title: Discussing Favors
learningGoal: The learner will verbally construct sentences using 'kuremasu' to explain receiving an item/favor from someone else, and 'agemasu' to offer a favor in return.
instructions: In this roleplay, a colleague asks about your new umbrella. Reply verbally in Japanese based on the English prompts, paying close attention to the verbs of exchange.

contentItems.text: Remember: You CANNOT use 'agemashita' when Tanaka gave the umbrella to you.

speakingPrompt: Translate: 1) Tanaka-san gave me this umbrella. 2) He lent it to me. 3) I will help Tanaka-san tomorrow.
scenario: Chatting with a colleague about a nice umbrella.

subTasks.prompt: Explain where you got it. Say: 'Tanaka-san gave me this umbrella.'

sampleResponse.targetText: たなかさんが この かさを くれました。
sampleResponse.transliteration: Tanaka-san ga kono kasa wo kuremashita.

subTasks.prompt: Clarify that it is not a permanent gift. Say: 'He lent it to me.'

sampleResponse.targetText: かして くれました。

subTasks.prompt: Explain how you will repay the favor. Say: 'I will help Tanaka-san tomorrow.'

sampleResponse.targetText: あした たなかさんを てつだって あげます。

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: たなかさんが この かさを くれました。
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Tanaka-san ga kono kasa wo kuremashita.

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: かして くれました。
あした たなかさんを てつだって あげます。

expectedSpeakingPoints: Say Tanaka-san ga kono kasa wo kuremashita
Say Ashita Tanaka-san wo tetsudatte agemasu
acceptableParaphrases: Accept 'Watashi wa ashita...' for the third sentence.

criteria.name: Kureru Usage
criteria.description: Did the learner accurately use kuremashita for the received item/favor?

criteria.name: Te-form Linking
criteria.description: Did the learner link kashite and tetsudatte properly?

criteria.name: Ageru Usage
criteria.description: Did the learner use agemasu for the favor they are giving?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: たなかさんが この かさを くれました。かして くれました。あした たなかさんを てつだって あげます。

feedbackRules.onPass: Fantastic speaking! You have successfully mastered giving and receiving favors.
feedbackRules.onFail: Review the difference between Kuremasu and Agemasu. You cannot use Agemasu when someone gives something to you.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! Make sure you linked the Te-form and the giving verb without pausing.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: いい かさですね。たなかさんが この かさを くれました。かして くれました。あした たなかさんを てつだって あげます。

hintText: Tanaka is doing the giving in the first two sentences, so use Kuremashita. YOU are doing the giving in the last sentence, so use Agemasu.
